title: Implement specialized prime field types (Mersenne, Proth primes)
description: Implement optimized structs for primes with fast reduction via bit-hacks. Mersenne primes (2^n - 1): reduction via bitwise AND + ADD (e.g., 2^31-1). Proth primes (k*2^n + 1): reduction via shifts and subtracts, useful for NTT/FFT. Goldilocks primes (e.g., 2^64 - 2^32 + 1): reduction via shifts and subtracts.
